home.heroDescription: A practical learning environment for developers and technology professionals to see how LLM systems actually behave — from tokens and prompts to RAG, tooling, and production patterns, with an interactive playground in every lesson.
home.whatYouLearnDesc: From tokens and context windows to RAG and production patterns — everything you need to reason about, design, and ship real LLM-powered applications.
home.curriculumDesc: Five modules: foundations, prompting, structured outputs, advanced techniques, and production systems — all framed for people building real AI-powered products.
home.readyDesc: Start with the first lesson and experiment your way toward production-ready patterns — at your own pace, with practical, system-focused examples.
home.footer: Frodex — Interactive lessons and playground experiments to understand how large language models behave in real systems.

llms.title: How LLMs Work
llms.description: Understand transformers, tokenization, and next-token prediction

prompting.title: Prompt Engineering
prompting.description: Master system prompts, few-shot learning, and structured outputs

functionCalling.title: Function Calling
functionCalling.description: Enable LLMs to interact with external APIs and tools

cot.title: Chain of Thought
cot.description: Improve accuracy with step-by-step reasoning techniques

rag.title: RAG Systems
rag.description: Build retrieval-augmented generation for accurate responses

production.title: Production Skills
production.description: Learn streaming, evaluation, and cost optimization

nav.tagline: Explore how language models actually work
nav.builtFor: Built for developers and technology professionals
nav.clearProgressConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all your progress?

playground.title: Playground
playground.promptPlaceholder: Enter your prompt or select an experiment above...
playground.emptyDescription: Choose an experiment above or type your own prompt, then click Run to see the model's response here.
playground.rateLimited: You are sending requests too quickly. Please wait a few seconds and try again.
playground.serverError: Temporary error while talking to the model. Please try again in a few seconds.
playground.badRequestError: The request was rejected by the server. Please check your prompt and try again.
playground.genericError: Failed to generate a response from the model.
playground.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred while talking to the model. Please try again.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The lesson or page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

courseComplete.title: Congratulations! You completed the course
courseComplete.congrats: You made it to the end. Fill in your details below to generate your certificate of completion.
courseComplete.termsAgreePrefix: I have read and agree to the
courseComplete.termsAgreeSuffix: and to the collection of my name and email for certificate issuance.
courseComplete.errorInvalidFields: Please fill in name and email correctly.
courseComplete.errorSendFailed: Could not submit. Please try again later.
courseComplete.linkedInShareText: I completed the practical course on LLM systems. I printed my certificate and want to share.
courseComplete.shareBody: Next step: download the certificate image and share on social media. You'll showcase your achievement on LinkedIn and your résumé, and your post helps others discover the course.
courseComplete.linkedInHint: Download the image as PNG before closing the page.
